positive: Minimalist geometric celestial map featuring intertwined constellations, stylized planets, and glowing nebula elements. The composition is symmetrical and centered, designed for apparel printing. Utilize deep sapphire blues, shimmering gold leaf accents, and pearlescent white highlights. The style should be a blend of Art Deco geometry and celestial engraving, with clean, distinct silhouettes. Strong contrast and high detail are crucial. Flat illustration style with subtle dimensionality, resembling screen printing or linocut relief. Vector art quality, perfect for a t-shirt print, isolated on a transparent background conceptualization.
